issue_summary: Introduce support for type safety in ExtensionContext.Store
javadoc_before:
/**
 * {@code ExtensionValuesStore} is used inside implementations of
 * {@link ExtensionContext}

 * {@link #getOrComputeIfAbsent}.
 *
 * @since 5.0
 */
javadoc_after:
